title: CargoDocs Bill of Lading
description: An electronic bill of lading (eBoL) or sea waybill (SWB) managed through the CargoDocs platform, representing a document of title for shipped cargo.

documentId.description: The unique identifier for the bill of lading document.

documentType.description: The type of bill of lading document.

transactionId.description: The unique identifier for the transaction this bill of lading belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the bill of lading (e.g., draft, issued, surrendered).

draftId.description: The unique identifier for the draft version of this bill of lading.

shipperDetails.description: Details of the shipper named on the bill of lading.

consigneeDetails.description: Details of the consignee named on the bill of lading.

cargoDetails.description: Details of the cargo described on the bill of lading.

issuedAt.description: The timestamp when the bill of lading was issued.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the bill of lading was created.
